violations.text: Various foods were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Dates were added at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, beef was placed hot and covered in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Beef was observed at 50 DF and was cooked 2 hours prior to inspection. Beef was reheated to over 165 DF and proper cooling methods were reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
There is no hot water in the establishment. Maintenace was here fixing the hot water tank at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Establishment must install an air gap. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025
The hood system was observed with an accumulation of debris. Hood system should be maintained as frequently as needed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2024
A pot was observed collecting over flow from the prep sink. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2024
A Ceiling tile in the kitchen was observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2024
